items.title: 'I ate ketchup and cheese,' says Venezuelan girl trapped under quake rubble for 32 hours
items.dek: Fabiana was trapped in the rubble of a 10-storey residential building after two earthquakes rocked Venezuela in June.
items.body: Fabiana was trapped in the rubble of a 10-storey residential building after two earthquakes rocked Venezuela in June.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nine killed in Russian strikes on Kyiv on eve of Nato summit in Turkey
items.dek: Crews are racing to find survivors under rubble as Russia targets Kyiv in air strikes for the second time in a week.
items.body: Crews are racing to find survivors under rubble as Russia targets Kyiv in air strikes for the second time in a week.

items.title: ‘My stomach is eating itself’: Biohacker Bryan Johnson reveals incurable illness
